LT Communication Agencies Competitor Dashboard
nodes.description: Self-contained HTML analytical dashboard of 113 (later 132) Lithuanian communication/marketing/consulting agencies, 2019-2024.

nodes.label: Fabula ir partneriai
nodes.description: The owner's company (formerly VRP, code 124099127), gold-highlighted and surfaced first everywhere in the dashboard.

nodes.label: Komunikacija-konsultacija-konkurentai.xlsx
nodes.description: The original rekvizitai.vz.lt Excel export the dashboard is built from.

nodes.label: index.html
nodes.description: The generated, self-contained deliverable dashboard served at repo root for GitHub Pages; never hand-edited.

nodes.label: src/template.html
nodes.description: HTML/CSS/JS source template with __DATA__/__SHEETS_DATA__ placeholders; the file to edit.

nodes.label: src/build_site.py
nodes.description: Build script that injects the JSON data into the template to produce index.html.

nodes.label: data/data.json
nodes.description: Core financials: cleaned per-company per-year records (660, later 906 rows) extracted from the Excel file.

nodes.label: data/sheets_data.json
nodes.description: 7 raw Excel sheets backing the Data Explorer.

nodes.label: data/rek_tabs.json
nodes.description: Scraped rekvizitai.vz.lt profiles, one block per company, source for the Rekvizitai page.

nodes.label: data/data_events.json
nodes.description: Data-change audit log JSON.

nodes.label: data/sodra/*.json
nodes.description: 115 files of monthly Sodra payroll/headcount per company, loaded per-company.

nodes.label: scripts/scrape_company.py
nodes.description: Scrapes every rekvizitai tab for a slug into data/raw/<slug>_<tab>.html.

nodes.label: scripts/parse_company.py
nodes.description: Parses raw scraped HTML tabs and upserts a company block into rek_tabs.json.

nodes.label: scripts/autoscrape.py
nodes.description: One-command pipeline that diffs data.json vs rek_tabs.json, resolves slugs, scrapes, parses and writes.

nodes.label: scripts/browser_session.py
nodes.description: Keeps a persistent Chrome profile to clear the Cloudflare interstitial once and reuse the clearance cookie.

nodes.label: scripts/scrape_sodra.py
nodes.description: Fetches a company's monthly Sodra history into data/sodra/<jarCode>.json via the open Sodra JSON REST API.

nodes.label: scripts/estimate_2025.py
nodes.description: Python script computing the estimated 2025 year rows (salaryCosts, nonSalaryCosts, estimatedIncome).

nodes.label: CLAUDE.md
nodes.description: Project instructions: tags, rules, and project context auto-loaded by Claude.

nodes.label: Schema.md
nodes.description: Map of events, hooks and permissions, plus the hook-vs-context framework.

nodes.label: UI.md
nodes.description: UI/UX design context and space-efficiency rubric loaded by ui_design_reminder.py.

nodes.label: docs/FUNCTIONAL_MAP.md
nodes.description: Complete functional map of template.html snapshot for the Next.js migration.

nodes.label: Hook mechanism
nodes.description: Code that runs on an event, deterministically injecting conditional context; informs but never force-blocks.

nodes.label: Context mechanism
nodes.description: Always-on text injected into the window (CLAUDE.md, tool output); influences probabilistically and can be forgotten.

nodes.label: The hook test
nodes.description: If a program can detect relevance with no judgment, use a hook; otherwise plain Context.

nodes.label: commit_message_check.py
nodes.description: PreToolUse hook warning when a git commit subject misses the house format.

nodes.label: version_reminder.py
nodes.description: PostToolUse hook reminding to bump badge, log SP and rebuild after a template edit.

nodes.label: save_reminder.py
nodes.description: Stop hook reminding to commit+push when the tree is dirty or main is unpushed.

nodes.label: rule_schema_reminder.py
nodes.description: UserPromptSubmit hook injecting the hook-vs-context framework on a rule-add/change prompt.

nodes.label: ui_design_reminder.py
nodes.description: UserPromptSubmit hook injecting UI.md's rubric and telling the AI to ask for a screenshot on UI prompts.

nodes.label: guard_main_push.py
nodes.description: PreToolUse hook warning a desktop session committing/pushing to main (web exempt).

nodes.label: .githooks commit-msg
nodes.description: Git-level commit-msg hook shared via core.hooksPath, firing for all clients.

nodes.label: Space-efficiency rubric
nodes.description: Six-line scored checklist for width/content proportion, atomic-token wrapping, reach ladder and tokens.

nodes.label: Render-critique-refine loop
nodes.description: Mandatory UI process: ask for a screenshot, score the render, rebuild, re-score; never one-shot.

nodes.label: Markets (Dashboard) view
nodes.description: dashView: market-wide KPIs, segment charts, rankings, scatter, market money-flow.

nodes.label: Companies view
nodes.description: companiesView: per-company profile, money-flow, vs-market ranking, deep-dive time series.

nodes.label: Data Explorer (Rekvizitai) view
nodes.description: rekView: raw per-company Rekvizitai/Sodra/Initial tables, coverage grid, data-changes log, raw Excel sheets.

nodes.label: Bespoke SVG chart engine
nodes.description: Hand-written inline SVG engine (drawFinSvg/drawBarsSvg) rendering 7 of 9 charts with pan/zoom.

nodes.label: Chart.js 4.4.3
nodes.description: The only runtime dependency, loaded via CDN, used for just 2 charts (#chSegments, #chScatter).

nodes.label: makeSectionsCollapsible()
nodes.description: Load-time function that reparents dashView section nodes into companiesView, the migration hotspot.

nodes.label: Custom dropdown component
nodes.description: Non-native .co-select dropdown with search, listbox and multi-select pills used everywhere instead of <select>.

nodes.label: Dev mode
nodes.description: Unlocked by clicking the version badge 7x; reveals formula disclosures, debug overlays, changelog FAB and explore buttons.

nodes.label: Version-history FAB + modal
nodes.description: Shows total SP, version count and a collapsible era-to-release tree built from the VERSIONS array.

nodes.label: Next.js migration
nodes.description: Planned rebuild of the static file into React/Next.js, driven by server+DB future features.

nodes.label: revenue (turnover / apyvarta)
nodes.description: The data field revenue means turnover/apyvarta including pass-through media ad spend.

nodes.label: estimatedIncome (revenue / spėjamos pajamos)
nodes.description: Fee income excluding pass-through; margins are computed from it.

nodes.label: BULD-01 Edit source
nodes.description: Edit src/template.html, never index.html; rebuild with build_site.py.

nodes.label: REPO-01 Save
nodes.description: Commit and push to main after every change; owner only sees the live site.

nodes.label: REPO-02 Branch
nodes.description: Work from main and merge back immediately; never strand work on a side branch.

nodes.label: REPO-03 Sync first
nodes.description: Before work, git fetch origin main and rebase/merge as parallel AIs edit at once.

nodes.label: REPO-04 Merge conflicts
nodes.description: Never take one template.html side wholesale; merge feature-by-feature.

nodes.label: BULD-02 Version badge
nodes.description: One continuous counter; bump the patch digit on every commit and sync all four badge spots.

nodes.label: BULD-03 Story points
nodes.description: 0.5-10 story points per update by effort, logged in the VERSIONS array.

nodes.label: GIT-01 Commit format
nodes.description: Commit subject format: vN RULE-ID | short description | N sp.

nodes.label: HOOK-01 Scripted checks, never gates
nodes.description: Back every strong warning with a deterministic scripted check that only emits data and never blocks; enforce across all clients via a git hook.

nodes.label: UI-01 Screenshot-first design
nodes.description: On a UI change ask for a screenshot, score against UI.md, then render-critique-refine.

nodes.label: DATA-20 Custom dropdown
nodes.description: Never native <select> picker; use the custom styled dropdown.

nodes.label: DATA-28 Colours from one set
nodes.description: Use shared palette tokens; never ad-hoc bright colours.

nodes.label: DATA-30 Composite natural PK
nodes.description: DB tables key on real columns, no surrogate id.

nodes.label: DATA-40 Model + version line
nodes.description: End each reply with the model and vN version shift plus one line of what it changed.

nodes.label: PROC-01 Forgotten rule → hook it
nodes.description: A rule that keeps slipping gets a machine check, not more prose.

nodes.label: CONV-02 Never claim unseen visuals
nodes.description: Can't see the live site; say 'I changed X, please check', never 'it's fixed'.

nodes.label: CONV-03 Asks → AskUserQuestion
nodes.description: When the owner must do/check/pick, pop an AskUserQuestion, never bury it in prose.

nodes.label: DATA-16 Cram tight
nodes.description: Match the tightest existing UI; drop redundant labels; one scrolling row.

nodes.label: DATA-22 Small rounding
nodes.description: No full/pill rounding on buttons/chips/inputs; use a small-radius token.

nodes.label: DATA-46 Loading states everywhere
nodes.description: Every async op and heavy re-render shows an immediate indicator.

nodes.label: DATA-47 Graded values = popup
nodes.description: A graded/list-reordering control opens a menu rather than cycling on tap.

nodes.label: Self-source from state registries
nodes.description: Planned ingest of free Sodra/VMI/courts/Registrų centras layers to cut rekvizitai dependence.

nodes.label: Lithuanian i18n translation
nodes.description: Planned LT/EN language toggle for UI chrome via an i18n string table.

nodes.label: Supabase integration
nodes.description: Planned move from a static file to a Supabase/Postgres backend serving data via API.

nodes.label: Verifiability / source links
nodes.description: Planned traceability so every stat links to its raw source field/year in the Data Explorer.

nodes.label: Forecast future financials
nodes.description: Planned projection of turnover/revenue/profit/headcount forward from historical trend.

nodes.label: Error margins / uncertainty
nodes.description: Planned confidence bands on estimatedIncome, forecasts and medians.

nodes.label: More grouping options
nodes.description: Planned grouping by employee-count bands, company age and city besides activity.

nodes.label: Sodra state source
nodes.description: State Social Insurance Fund; monthly headcount and avg insured income via an open JSON REST API keyed by jarCode.

nodes.label: rekvizitai.vz.lt
nodes.description: Aggregator site republishing LT state-registry data with credit scoring; scraped across four tab URLs.

nodes.label: Sign-in / Auth
nodes.description: First migration feature: Auth.js sessions and roles, prerequisite for private data.

nodes.label: Private data in DB
nodes.description: Move the five sources into a DB so the browser only receives computed aggregates.

nodes.label: VersionHistory.md
nodes.description: Archive of owner requests and what was done per version; AI reference only.

nodes.label: Competitor dashboard
nodes.description: 113-agency dashboard with KPI strip, insights, market/segment/ranking/salary charts, explorer table.

nodes.label: My company section
nodes.description: Fabula section with KPI cards, market ranks, trend, percentile chart, gold marker, pinned explorer row.

nodes.label: VRP to Fabula rebrand
nodes.description: VRP rebranded to Fabula, code 124099127, same entity already in the data.

nodes.label: Version badge
nodes.description: Version number badge written in the header after every change.

nodes.label: SP history modal
nodes.description: Story-point/version history button and modal backed by the VERSIONS log.

nodes.label: VERSIONS array
nodes.description: In-page array logging each version, SP, title, description and detail.

nodes.label: Turnover vs revenue split
nodes.description: Split of turnover vs revenue across KPIs and charts with margins from revenue.

nodes.label: Data Explorer page
nodes.description: SPA page built from all Excel sheets with search/sort/pagination/CSV, sourced via __SHEETS_DATA__.

nodes.label: fabula.html standalone profile
nodes.description: Standalone Fabula company profile HTML built from rekvizitai CSV data.

nodes.label: fabula_ir_partneriai.csv
nodes.description: 65-field CSV scraped from the Fabula rekvizitai.vz.lt page.

nodes.label: MY_COMPANIES array
nodes.description: Array driving a company tab strip, rendered by renderCompany(brand).

nodes.label: vz Codex / constitution
nodes.description: Rules system recast around Hook (code that enforces) vs Context (text the model reads).

nodes.label: Hook vs Context mechanism
nodes.description: Two mechanisms of AI effect: Hook enforces via code, Context is advisory text.

nodes.label: White theme + toggle
nodes.description: White default theme with light/dark toggle persisted to localStorage; surfaces via CSS tokens.

nodes.label: Repo folder reorg
nodes.description: Reorg into src/ data/ scripts/ docs/ with index.html/CLAUDE.md/Schema.md at root.

nodes.label: companies-page-plan.md
nodes.description: Plan to rework the Companies page to mirror the Market page pattern.

nodes.label: Market page
nodes.description: Market dashboard with year/all-time tabs, basis toggle and money-flow charts; pattern source of truth.

nodes.label: Companies page
nodes.description: Per-selected-company page being reworked to mirror the Market page.

nodes.label: Total/Per-employee basis toggle
nodes.description: Basis toggle driving every graph on the company page (Total vs Per-employee).

nodes.label: Money-flow chart
nodes.description: Inverted stacked money-flow chart with profit at bottom and YoY badges per item.

nodes.label: drawFinSvg engine
nodes.description: Line/bar-line SVG chart engine sizing from container dimensions with niceTicks.

nodes.label: drawBarsSvg engine
nodes.description: Horizontal rank-bars SVG engine; got niceTicks x-axis in v0.1.181.

nodes.label: niceTicks round-step generator
nodes.description: Axis ticks at 1/2/5 x 10^n multiples so they stay round on pan/zoom.

nodes.label: chMine trajectory chart
nodes.description: Company all-years trajectory chart (revenue/turnover/profit/employees, avg pay).

nodes.label: Company rankings tab
nodes.description: Cross-company rankings tab (Top 20, growth leaders, size-vs-profit scatter); kept separate.

nodes.label: Company deep-dive
nodes.description: Collapsible per-source SDD charts on the company page; kept as-is.

nodes.label: notactiverules.md
nodes.description: Rules and items considered but not in force, moved out of CLAUDE.md.

nodes.label: Hand over rebuilt deliverable
nodes.description: Cross-project idea: give the user the built artifact, not just source/diff.

nodes.label: persistent-bugs.md
nodes.description: Log of recurring bugs (PB-n) with device, prior fixes, root cause, and guards.

nodes.label: PB-1 arbitrary axis numbers
nodes.description: Chart axis ticks non-round and changing on pan/zoom; fixed with niceTicks in both engines.

nodes.label: PB-2 CAGR card not per-year
nodes.description: Company Revenue CAGR-2019 card was an outlier vs per-year siblings; converted to YoY in v0.1.191.

nodes.label: PB-3 fix never reached build
nodes.description: Scatter per-employee edits not in committed index.html; re-applied and grep-verified in v0.1.195.

nodes.label: PB-4 black-on-black dark text
nodes.description: Surface/border token used as text colour made text invisible in dark mode; fixed with --muted and color-scheme.

nodes.label: PB-5 doughnut toggle dark text
nodes.description: UA button appearance overrode authored white; fixed with appearance:none in v0.1.207.

nodes.label: PB-6 charts don't fit first load
nodes.description: Charts mis-sized on first load after card reparenting; fixed with refitSvg on double-rAF in v0.2.6.

nodes.label: refitSvg
nodes.description: Refits SVG charts to their container; must be called after moving/resizing a chart node.

nodes.label: Patch company vs market labels workflow
nodes.description: Self-deleting CI that patches template.html chart labels/palette, rebuilds and commits v86.

nodes.label: Refresh Sodra data workflow
nodes.description: workflow_dispatch job scraping Sodra open API, rebuilding index.html and committing data changes.

nodes.label: Chart label cleanup workflow
nodes.description: Push-triggered self-deleting CI patching chart labels/palette, rebuilding and committing v83.

nodes.label: Sodra open API
nodes.description: atvira.sodra.lt open JSON REST API with no bot check; usable from datacenter IPs.

nodes.label: .githooks/commit-msg
nodes.description: Git hook enforcing the GIT-01 commit subject regex.

nodes.label: CMP_PAL compare palette
nodes.description: Compare colour palette reordered so first two selected companies are teal and purple.

nodes.label: chMineRank percentile chart
nodes.description: Percentile-vs-market rank bars chart rebuilt with one metric label per group in grouped mode.

nodes.label: missing_slugs.txt
nodes.description: Verified rekvizitai slugs for previously-missing companies, to feed scrape_batch.

nodes.label: rekvizitai scrape pipeline
nodes.description: Scrape of rekvizitai.vz.lt, blocked by a temporary 403/Cloudflare rate-block.

nodes.label: BULD-01 edit source rule
nodes.description: index.html is generated; edit template.html and rebuild, never hand-edit index.html.

nodes.label: BULD-02 version badge rule
nodes.description: Version counter bumped on human changes; data-only refresh uses v0 and no bump.

nodes.label: GIT-01 commit format rule
nodes.description: Commit subject format vN RULE-ID | description | N sp enforced by the commit-msg hook.

nodes.label: Live-deploy rule
nodes.description: Rebuilding index.html is what actually puts new data on the live page.
